case_title: HECTOR MINIMO et al VS. MELISSA DEL ROSARIO

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-07-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-07-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM AL ANOLIK. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS HELPED BY TERRENCE BERNARDO--TAGALO INTERPRETOR. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MARY REYNOLDS--AAA CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AL ANOLIK. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MINIMO, HECTOR MINIMO, LITA MINIMO, CENSISIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEL ROSARIO, MELISSA $3,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,820.00, HECTOR MINIMO--$2,250; LITA MINIMO--$750; CENISIO MINIMO--$700 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MINIMO, HECTOR MINIMO, LITA MINIMO, CENSISIO AS TO DEFENDANT DEL ROSARIO, MELISSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
